items.name: Yosh's Pupu Platter
items.description: Our fearless leader's favorite assortment of pupu's, including coconut prawns, gyoza, lumpia shanghai, BBQ pork & 2 beef robatas, accompanied by an assortment of sauces.

items.name: Spicy Fried Rice
items.description: Our own combination of Portuguese sausage, peas, carrots, onions, eggs & our homemade BBQ pork combined with white rice, sriracha & oyster sauce topped with green onions. Options: add fried egg +$3.50, add Spam +$6, add bacon +$5.50.

items.name: Edamame (Chibi)
items.description: Boiled soybeans, lightly seasoned w/ kosher salt.

items.name: Edamame (Kahuna)
items.description: Boiled soybeans, lightly seasoned w/ kosher salt. Larger portion.

items.name: Tempura Sampler
items.description: Traditional Japanese tempura w/ prawns & assorted vegetables, served w/ tempura sauce.

items.name: Hawaiian Style Poke
items.description: Cubed fresh tuna, salmon, sliced white & green onions tossed w/ sesame oil, shoyu, red pepper flakes, served w/ homemade taro chips.

items.name: BBQ Pork
items.description: Chef Marcos' homemade BBQ pork, Chinese style, served w/ homemade BBQ sauce & spicy mustard.

items.name: Veggie Spring Rolls
items.description: Rice flour wraps filled w/ somen noodles, carrots, cilantro, cucumber & lettuce, served w/ spicy peanut sauce. Add salmon or shrimp +$5.

items.name: Gyoza Yaki
items.description: Tender crisp cabbage & pork dumplings, spiked w/ ginger, soy sauce & mirin, served w/ a chili oil & shoyu sauce.

items.name: Lumpia Shanghai
items.description: Thin crisp Filipino style egg rolls filled with shrimp & pork, served w/ sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Beef Robata
items.description: Tender pieces of beef marinated in our homemade teriyaki sauce.

items.name: Oh So Ono Coconut Prawns
items.description: 4 prawns, citrus marinated then dusted w/ sweet coconut flakes & fried, served w/ sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Fish or Kalua Pork Tacos
items.description: Two tasty tacos filled w/ lightly fried panko dusted cod, grated cheese & tartar sauce, or homemade kalua pork served on grilled flour tortilla's w/ homemade pico de gallo.

items.name: Ohana Sliders (Kalua or Spam)
items.description: Your choice of homemade kalua pork or grilled spam on dinner rolls topped w/ spicy coleslaw & pesto mayo w/ fries.

items.name: Agedashi Tofu
items.description: Soft tofu dipped in cornstarch & fried golden brown, served w/ bonito flakes & tempura sauce.

items.name: Spicy Teriyaki or Buffalo Wings
items.description: Fried chicken wings tossed in your choice of spicy teriyaki sauce or traditional buffalo sauce.

categories.name: Musubi's
categories.note: Assorted protein served on a block of musubi rice wrapped with a strip of nori. Set of 2 per order. Add homemade tamago to any musubi for $4.50.

items.name: Musubi Sampler
items.description: Get one each of our specialty musubi's.

items.name: Spam Musubi
items.description: Grilled slices of original recipe Spam lightly drizzled w/ an oyster plum sauce.

items.name: Chicken Katsu Musubi
items.description: Our homemade chicken katsu fried crisp served w/ our homemade katsu sauce.

items.name: Portuguese Sausage Musubi
items.description: Hawaiian Portuguese sausage grilled.

items.name: Veggie Tempura Musubi
items.description: One piece each of sweet potato & zucchini, tempura fried lightly drizzled w/ an oyster plum sauce.

items.name: Buffalo Katsu Musubi
items.description: Our homemade chicken katsu tossed in a spicy buffalo sauce.

items.name: Red Hot Dog Musubi
items.description: Hawaiian style red hot dog tossed in a shoyu/sugar sauce then grilled.

categories.name: 'Aina Pa'ina (Entrees)
categories.note: Prices shown are regular plate size / YOSH size (double portion for less cost).

items.name: Loco Moco
items.description: Da Braddah's favorite! A grilled beef patty topped w/ 2 fried eggs over rice, smothered w/ brown gravy & grilled onions. Served w/ potato & mac salad. Options: sub fried rice +$6, sub kalua pork (no charge), add bacon +$5.50, add katsu or Spam +$6. YOSH size: $53.20.

items.name: Kalua Pork
items.description: Hawaiian style slow roasted pork served w/ cabbage, rice & a side of potato & mac salad. YOSH size: $51.30.

items.name: Curry Rice
items.description: Rich pork curry stew w/ onion, green pepper, celery, potato & carrots. Served w/ rice & an orange, seaweed salad & takuan. Add chicken katsu +$6. YOSH size: $49.40.

items.name: Adobo
items.description: Chicken drumettes slowly braised w/ garlic, bay leaves, shoyu & coconut milk, then grilled for a caramelized crust. Served w/ rice & broccoli. YOSH size: $53.20.

items.name: Yakisoba
items.description: Fresh vegetables, fried tofu & yakisoba noodles sauteed in a homemade yakisoba sauce. Extra tofu +$3. With chicken: $27 / YOSH $51.30. YOSH size: $43.70.

items.name: Kalua Pork Sandwich
items.description: Slow roasted luau style pork served w/ shredded cabbage & your choice of crispy fries or side salad.

items.name: Chicken Katsu
items.description: Tender fillets lightly battered then coated in panko breadcrumbs & fried to a crisp, served w/ rice & your choice of potato & mac salad or spicy coleslaw. YOSH size: $53.20.

items.name: Ginger Chicken Broccoli
items.description: Strips of chicken stir fried w/ broccoli, onions, carrots & bell peppers in a ginger-oyster sauce & served w/ rice. Sub noodles +$3. YOSH size: $53.20.

items.name: Big Kahuna Fish & Chips
items.description: 4 tender pieces of line caught cod, dipped in citrus milk, panko battered & fried. Served over fries w/ our homemade tartar sauce, ketchup & spicy coleslaw. YOSH size: $55.10.

items.name: Ohana Cheese Burger
items.description: 1/3 pound lean beef patty, American/Swiss cheese, pesto mayo, pineapple, grilled onions, lettuce & tomato. Served w/ your choice of crispy fries or a side salad. Add bacon +$5.50.

items.name: Island Style Baby Back Ribs
items.description: 1/2 rack of ribs rubbed w/ blackened aromatic spices, grilled then brushed w/ a spicy tropical fruit BBQ sauce. Served w/ steamed rice & broccoli. YOSH size: $60.80.

items.name: Nabeyaki Udon
items.description: Udon noodles served in the traditional style w/ mushrooms, spinach, fishcake, BBQ pork & poached egg in a seafood broth, served w/ tempura shrimp.

items.name: Ohana Salad
items.description: Spring mix tossed in a miso-peanut butter vinaigrette topped w/ roasted pepper & rice cracker. Add chicken +$6, add salmon +$6. YOSH size: $24.70.

categories.name: Teriyaki Plates
categories.note: All meals come with rice & miso soup. Prices shown are regular plate size / YOSH size (double portion for less cost).

items.name: Chicken Teriyaki / Spicy Chicken Teriyaki
items.description: Grilled chicken thighs marinated in our homemade teriyaki sauce, served w/ broccoli. YOSH size: $53.20.

items.name: Salmon Teriyaki
items.description: Fresh salmon lightly seasoned & grilled to perfection topped w/ our homemade teriyaki sauce & served w/ broccoli. YOSH size: $58.90.

items.name: Shogun Bento
items.description: Chicken katsu served w/ your choice of chicken or beef teriyaki, coleslaw, takuan & seaweed salad.

items.name: Beef Teriyaki / Spicy Beef Teriyaki
items.description: Tender grilled steak marinated in teriyaki sauce, served w/ broccoli. YOSH size: $58.90.

items.name: Tofu Teriyaki
items.description: Grilled tofu cutlet topped w/ our homemade teriyaki sauce & served w/ broccoli.

items.name: Sumo Bento
items.description: Chicken katsu & salmon teriyaki w/ your choice of chicken or beef teriyaki, coleslaw, takuan & seaweed salad.

items.name: Banana Cream Pie
items.description: Our homemade version of this classic, Oreo cookie crust, fresh bananas, vanilla pudding & whipped cream. Served with an Oreo cookie, sliced bananas and chocolate sauce.

items.name: Pele's Ice Cream
items.description: Your choice of any of our ice cream flavors, wrapped in pound cake & tempura fried.

items.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
items.description: Rich chocolate pudding in a dark chocolate cake, served w/ a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Ice Cream
items.description: Locally made rich & creamy ice cream. Your choice of Toasted Coconut or Madagascar Vanilla.

items.name: Extra Sauces
items.description: Teriyaki, katsu, adobo, gyoza, tartar, or sweet chili.

items.name: Mahalo Mai Tai
items.description: Rum, amaretto, grenadine, pineapple juice, orange juice & a float of dark rum.

items.name: Big Island Ice Tea
items.description: Vodka, gin, rum, triple sec, pass-o-guava juice, lemon-lime soda & a dash of mango puree over ice.

items.name: Blue Hawaiian
items.description: Rum, pineapple juice, sour mix & blue curacao served over ice.

items.name: Molokai Mule
items.description: Ketel One vodka served w/ lime juice & ginger beer.

items.name: Paniolo Skinny Margarita
items.description: 21 Seeds cucumber jalapeno tequila, triple sec, fresh lime juice, soda water & a Tajin rim.

items.name: Mauna Loa Sunrise
items.description: Gin, pineapple and grapefruit juice, splash of lime and black raspberry liqueur.

items.name: Hawaiian Harbor
items.description: Aviation gin, orgeat (almond), lemon & lime juice & Angostura bitters.

items.name: Howzit Dark & Stormy
items.description: Kraken dark rum, fresh lime juice & ginger beer.

items.name: Paradise Paloma
items.description: Reposado tequila, grapefruit juice, soda water with a Tajin rim.

items.name: Toshiro Old Fashion
items.description: Iichiko shochu, simple syrup & a dash of bitters served over ice.

items.name: Zacapa Old Fashioned
items.description: Zacapa No. 25 Guatemalan rum, tiki bitters & sugar. Elevate with Ron Zacapa XO, aged in cognac casks, +$9.

items.name: Lava Flow
items.description: Rum, pineapple juice & coconut creme, blended smooth & served w/ a strawberry swirl.

items.name: Mala Shake
items.description: Rum, coconut rum & white rum, strawberry & mango puree, fresh banana, pineapple juice, coconut creme & pass-o-guava juice.

items.name: Mango Madness
items.description: Vodka, pineapple juice, coconut creme & mango puree.

items.name: Lychee Martini
items.description: Vodka, lychee juice shaken & served in a chilled martini glass.

items.name: Tini Bit Tiki
items.description: Ketel One Peach & Orange Blossom Botanical, fresh lemon juice, orgeat (almond) & Aperol.

items.name: East Sider
items.description: Empress gin & lychee juice shaken up cold & served straight up.
